findings.title: Almost no distribution yet
findings.detail: Channel has 13 videos but only 5 channel views (6 summed on videos). 9/14 Shorts still sit at 0 views — YouTube is barely testing them in the Shorts feed.

findings.title: Made for Kids limits Shorts feed reach
findings.detail: Channel and every video are Made for Kids (required for this niche under COPPA). MFK disables comments/notifications and blocks personalized Shorts targeting, so growth is much slower than general-audience Shorts. Do NOT flip this off — kids content must stay MFK. Expect search + parent shares + YouTube Kids, not viral Shorts.

findings.title: 1 videos reference high-risk kids IP
findings.detail: Titles/tags like Baby Shark are frequently claimed or limited. Prefer original Benny songs and public-domain nursery rhymes with original arrangements.

findings.title: 4 videos published in the same minute
findings.detail: Dumping multiple Shorts within seconds looks like spam to the algorithm. Always use staggered --publish-at scheduling (already in run_daily_batch.py).

findings.title: No seed audience (1 subscriber)
findings.detail: New/reactivated channels need a few real watches from parents/friends in the first hours. Without that seed, MFK Shorts often stay at 0–2 views.

findings.title: YouTube Analytics API not enabled
findings.detail: Impressions / CTR / traffic sources are unavailable until Analytics API is enabled in Google Cloud and yt-analytics.readonly is added to OAuth scopes. Without impressions we cannot tell '0 views because 0 impressions' vs 'shown but swiped'.

A sweet moral lesson story where Benny helps a friend clean up.
Toddlers learn kindness, gentle words, and teamwork through cartoon play.
Safe preschool story for kids ages 2-8 in American English.
